description: Originally launched on the BSC network, Siren (SIREN) emerged in 2025 as an AI Analyst Agent for DeFi applications. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 SIREN (1:1 pegged to BEP-20 SIREN) gives original SIREN holders, traders, and users instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, transforming SIREN into a faster, smarter, and more scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Siren
